channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tip of wood and other including black bags, 31st May
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped some garden stuff and black bags in the street and the streets are just a complete mess they need a good sweep and when they sweep they need to pick the rubbish up instead of leaving it in piles just for it to be kicked or blown around the street again also none of the black lid bins have been emptied so there is rubbish spilling out of them also
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Passfield Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 31st May
item.description:
Witnessed a man dumping rubbish from a van

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On 31/05/2026 at 16:18, a dog walker stopped on the pavement next to the entrance to my home, allowed his fog to ease itselfed and walked away without leaming ip the faeces. This was caught on camera., 31st May
item.description:
This happed on 31/05/2026 at 16:18

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pennine Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On 31/05/2026 at 16:18, a dog owner stopped on the pavement next to the entrance of my home for his dog to ease itself, then left the faeces and walked away with his dog without clearing the faeces., 31st May
item.description:
Dog fouling on public space was not picked or cleaner by the dog owner. This was captured on video
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pennine Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass canopy above 53 laxley close needs removal of moss an debris, 31st May
item.description:
The glass canopy above 53 laxley close and other properties on that block have excessive moss and plant debris on top. Please have this remidied Kind regards
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grimsel Path, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped broken fences, 31st May
item.description:
Old garden fences on corner outside 2 / 3 colne road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colne Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, broken glass and general detritus on both sides of queen street, 31st May
item.description:
There is lots of litter, broken glass and detritus along Queen Street , both sides of the road. I have swept the pavement to clear it for pedestrians and children walking but there is lots of rubbish in the gutter / kerb on both sides.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Queen Street, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
